name: Beef Rouladen
recipeIngredient: 8 slices top round steak, 1/4 inch thick (about 2 lbs)
1 large onion, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard on each slice of steak; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Place 1 bacon strip and a few onion wedges on each slice; roll up and secure with wooden picks.
3. Brown the rolls in a skillet in oil, then drain.
4. Add broth; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender. Remove heat and keep warm.
5. Combine flour and water until smooth; stir into broth. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
6. Remove wooden picks from meat and return to gravy; heat through.
7. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
